entry.title: What is 1d2f0.info?
entry.summary:
1d2f0 was the first 5 characters of a md5sum hash of a lost unknown file.

1d2f0 is also the code for a unicode character - (apparently) the Mayan symbol for the number 16 :
entry.content:
1d2f0 was the first 5 characters of a md5sum hash of a lost unknown file.

1d2f0 is also the code for a unicode character - (apparently) the Mayan symbol for the number 16 :
